meta.jobPostingSource: Greenhouse API job id 8371211002 (careers page may require JavaScript to render)

overallMatch.summary: Strong moderate-to-good fit for Solution Sales Executive. Max brings 21+ years of enterprise software experience, including 18+ years in presales/sales consulting at Workday and Oracle. His HCM and workforce domain expertise aligns with Moveworks' AI platform for employee productivity. The posting accepts an AE or alternative sales/customer service role—presales qualifies. Strengths: Hong Kong location (exact match), AI integration experience (n8n, Flowise, Cursor, AI agents), C-level engagement, and ROI/solution win depth. Main consideration: articulate how presales leadership maps to coaching AEs and territory strategy per the ServiceNow Moveworks AI specialty motion.

granularScores.rationale: AI integration experience (n8n, Flowise, Cursor, AI agent development); 5+ years ROI/solution win knowledge (18+ years); consultative selling, discovery, demos, POC/RFP. Presales skills transfer to coach AEs and territory strategy. Value selling methodology (MEDDPIC, Challenger) not explicitly cited on public profile.

21 years enterprise software; 18+ in presales at Oracle and Workday. Posting allows AE or alternative sales/customer service role—presales qualifies. Head of Presales Greater China; coached teams; complex deals (JD.com, Tencent, Bytedance, Jardine Matheson). Sales-support vs. direct quota; relevant but not identical to AE path.
BSc (Hon) Computing Studies, Hong Kong Baptist University; PMP certification. Meets degree expectations; PMP adds credibility for complex deal execution.
Role is Remote, Hong Kong; candidate is Hong Kong-based. No relocation. 30–50% travel is manageable from HK for APAC coverage.
Career evolution: technical to PM to consultant to presales to Head of Presales. Cross-domain (HCM, ERP, PLM, CRM). Built AI agents and workflow automation. Strong learning agility.
Moveworks post–ServiceNow acquisition offers growth in agentic AI and ServiceNow AI Platform. Presales-to-specialty-solution motion is a credible extension.
Workday/Oracle presales leadership implies strong comp history. Posting bands vary by region; validate OTE and grade in process.

jobRequirements.requirement: Leverage or critically integrate AI into work processes, decision-making, or problem-solving
jobRequirements.evidence: n8n, Flowise, Cursor, AI agent development; Workday AI ecosystem awareness

jobRequirements.requirement: 5+ years knowledge on ROI of specialty solutions to lead solution win
jobRequirements.evidence: 18+ years presales; POC, RFP, value storytelling, complex enterprise wins

jobRequirements.requirement: Experience as an AE or in alternative sales/customer service role
jobRequirements.evidence: Head of Presales; Principal Presales; Senior Sales Consultant (Oracle)—customer-facing revenue motion
Full-cycle presales; account planning; territory strategy; discovery
Greater China coverage; cross-border enterprise work

jobRequirements.requirement: Support territory strategy; coach AEs, ADRs, ACE on specialty solutions; SC interlock
jobRequirements.evidence: Led presales teams; partnered with sales on account and territory planning
Adjacent ecosystem awareness; deepen EmployeeWorks, AI Assistant, Reasoning Engine

strengths: Hong Kong base matches Remote, Hong Kong posting exactly
Hands-on AI and automation: n8n, Flowise, Cursor, AI agents—aligned with agentic AI narrative
Deep HCM/workforce domain: Workday and Oracle HCM; overlaps Moveworks buyer personas
Head of Presales Greater China: coaching, territory strategy, account planning themes
C-level and complex enterprise deal experience across Greater China
PMP certification for multi-stakeholder execution discipline

gaps.recommendation: Use posting language: alternative sales/customer service role. Emphasize influence on pipeline, solution win, and AE coaching.

gaps.gap: Value methodology not explicit on profile
gaps.recommendation: Add MEDDPICC/Challenger or similar if applicable; prepare quantified ROI stories.
Build one-pager on AI Assistant, Reasoning Engine, ServiceNow integration; cite public acquisition materials.
Quantify deal sizes influenced, pipeline contributed, and win rates where possible.

interviewPrepFocus: How presales experience satisfies alternative sales/customer service and specialty solution win
ServiceNow acquisition (Dec 2025) and joint value with Moveworks AI on ServiceNow
Two concrete stories: AI in workflows (n8n, Flowise, agents) and large enterprise win
Territory strategy and how you coached or enabled quota-carrying sellers
actionableRecommendations: Add a concise Moveworks alignment block: AI integration, workforce domain, HK base, AE enablement
Cover letter: post-acquisition interest; agentic AI + employee productivity outcomes
LinkedIn: surface automation, AI agents, presales leadership, and HK location prominently
Prepare ServiceNow fundamentals (Now Learning) and Moveworks product pages
In recruiter screen: clarify overlay vs IC, reporting line, success metrics, and comp band

highlights.executiveSummary: Moveworks delivers an agentic AI assistant, enterprise search, and Reasoning Engine for workforce automation. Acquired by ServiceNow (announced Mar 2025, completed Dec 15, 2025); integrated into ServiceNow AI Platform with ~5.5M users and ~250 mutual customers cited at close.
highlights.leadership: Bhavin Shah leads Moveworks into ServiceNow integration; Bill McDermott (Chairman & CEO) and Amit Zavery (President, COO, CPO) anchor parent GTM and platform AI strategy.
highlights.products: AI Assistant, Reasoning Engine, enterprise search; deep ServiceNow workflow integration; post-close themes such as EmployeeWorks and packaged AI platform plays.
highlights.culture: High-performance enterprise SaaS; Glassdoor aggregates ~3.8/5 (directional). Post-acquisition: clarify quota, territory, travel, and reporting with hiring team.
highlights.recommendation: Strong for specialty sellers who can prove ROI and partner with AEs/SCs; validate APAC remote support and SSE expectations.
